original_image_tags: A pink/salmon-colored document page, appearing to be the back of a form or routing sheet, with multiple ink stamps indicating receipt and processing by various FBI sections. The page has two hole-punch marks at the top.

elements.description: Pink page with multiple ink stamps and handwritten annotations. Visible stamps include 'FBI LABORATORY DIVISION', 'FBI LIAISON SECTION', 'FBI TECHNICAL LABORATORY', 'FBI ATOMIC ENERGY COMMISSION', and 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', along with dates such as 'Jul 21 4 52 PM '47' and 'Aug 11 10 37 AM '47'. Handwritten text and two hole-punches are also visible.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the pink page, multiple ink stamps, and two hole-punches, but Description B provides specific stamp names and dates that Description A does not mention or contradict.
